% ==========================================
% AUTO-GENERATED STAGING FILE FOR PAGE 9
% ==========================================
\documentclass{siddur}

% Custom page numbering to yield 9.a, 9.b, etc.
\renewcommand{\thepage}{9.\alph{page}}

% --- MACRO DEFINITIONS ---
\newcommand{\blockA}{%
  AS YOU TAUGHT TORAH \\
to those whose names I bear, \\
teach me Torah, too. \\
Its mystery beckons, \\
yet I struggle with its truth. \\
You meant Torah for me: \\
did You mean the struggle for me, too? \\
Don't let me struggle alone; \\
help me to understand, \\
to be wise, to listen, to know... \\
Lead me into the mystery. \\
בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה, יְיָ, אוֹהֵב עַמּוֹ יִשְׂרָאֵל. \\
Baruch atah, Adonai, ohev amo Yisrael.%
}

\newcommand{\blockB}{%
  ALL GOODNESS and truth are Yours, O God; \\
may no evil estrange us from You. \\
Let error not confound us; \\
help us understand Your will. \\
In adversity and prosperity, may Your law be our light. \\
May our deeds reflect Your love. \\
בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה, יְיָ, אוֹהֵב עַמּוֹ יִשְׂרָאֵל. \\
Baruch atah, Adonai, ohev amo Yisrael.%
}

% --- DOCUMENT BODY ---
\begin{document}
\blockA
\vspace{1em}
% \newpage % Uncomment to break page here
